43.reason: Error: This loop may access out-of-bounds when i == len-1, and the logic incorrectly skips combining more than two consecutive equal exponents.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: This loop may access out-of-bounds when i == len-1, and the logic incorrectly skips combining more than two consecutive equal exponents.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  This line may access out-of-bounds when i == len-1, and the logic incorrectly skips the next element without properly merging all equal exponents.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Error: accesses node0[i+1] out of bounds when i == len-1; also only combines two consecutive equal exponents, fails for multiple same exponents.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Out-of-bounds when i == len-1; only merges two consecutive terms, not all with same exponent
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Added boundary check 'i + 1 < len' to prevent accessing out-of-bounds memory when i is the last index. The original code accessed node0[i+1] without checking if i+1 < len, which causes undefined behavior.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Logic Error: Accessing node0[i+1] when i is the last index (len-1) causes out-of-bounds access. Also, this logic fails to merge more than two terms with the same exponent correctly because it skips the next term unconditionally after merging.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition accesses node0[i+1] when i == len-1, causing out-of-bounds read. Also, it only merges adjacent terms once, failing to handle cases where more than two terms share the same exponent after sorting.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Accessing node0[i+1] when i == len-1 leads to out-of-bounds read; also, this merging logic only merges adjacent duplicates once and fails to handle multiple terms with same exponent that become adjacent after sorting]
